focus: Atlanta couples events: live music, Afrobeat/reggae, art galleries, vegetarian food, comedy, dancing — May 9-23 2026
notes: Bi-weekly update. Key highlights: Xscape at Fox Theatre May 10, Friday Jazz at High Museum May 15, Daft Punk Night at Masquerade May 16, Slow Drag dance party May 16, Cocktails in the Garden May 14 & 21, Reggae Fest Massive at State Farm Arena May 23. Art: HELD opening at Nina Baldwin Gallery May 8, Spruill Returns exhibition ongoing. Comedy: Laughing Skull Lounge showcases nightly. Dancing: Hangeo Thursdays, Slow Drag, Daft Punk Night. Food: Piedmont Park Green Market every Saturday, Cocktails in the Garden every Thursday. All events curated for couples.
